# Vertex AI Release Notes - Complete Content Extract

## Overview
This document contains production updates to Vertex AI, with links to related release notes for Colab Enterprise, Generative AI on Vertex AI, and Vertex AI Workbench.

## Key Dates and Updates (March 2026 - April 2025)

### March 2026
- **Vertex Explainable AI Deprecated** (March 16): Vertex Explainable AI is now deprecated, requiring users to transition to alternative solutions
- **Partner Model Evaluations** (March 12): Gen AI evaluation service now supports assessing partner models including Anthropic and Llama models through console-based workflows
- **Vector Search 2.0 GA** (March 5): Generally available with collections, auto-embeddings, hybrid search, and enterprise connectivity options (PSC/PGA/VPC)
- **Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite** (March 3): "most cost-efficient Gemini model" optimized for low-latency, high-volume scenarios, public preview as gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
- **Gemini 3.1 Flash Image** (February 26): "high-quality image generation with improved pricing and latency"
- **Video Generation Deprecations** (March 3): Multiple preview endpoints deprecated, migration required by April 2, 2026

### February 2026
- **Anthropic Claude 3 Haiku Deprecated** (Feb 23): Shutdown scheduled August 23, 2026
- **Vertex AI Agent Builder - Code Execution GA** (Feb 18): Generally available feature
- **Claude Sonnet 4.6** (Feb 17): Available in Model Garden
- **Image Generation Endpoint Deprecations** (Feb 17): Multiple preview endpoints deprecated by March 19, 2026
- **Feature Store Deprecations** (Feb 17): Both optimized online serving and Legacy/V1 versions deprecated

### January 2026
- **Virtual Try-On GA** (Jan 23): Endpoint migration from preview to production version
- **Gemini 3 Flash Preview** (Dec 17): "designed to tackle challenging agentic problems with strong coding"
- **Sessions and Memory Bank GA** (Dec 17): Agent Engine features generally available
- **Agent Designer Preview** (Dec 19): Low-code visual designer available in console

### December 2025
- **Veo 3.1 GA** (Nov 17): Introduces standard and fast variants for video generation
- **Veo Extensions Support** (Dec 8): Video extension capability in preview
- **Confidential Computing GA** (Dec 9): "Encrypt your data-in-use" support for Workbench instances
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash with Native Audio GA** (Dec 12): "cutting-edge native audio functionality" for Live API

### November 2025
- **Kimi K2 Thinking**: Available for complex problem-solving and reasoning
- **Prompt Caching TTL Update**: "one-hour Time To Live" for Anthropic models
- **Claude 3.7 Sonnet Deprecated** (Nov 11): Shutdown May 11, 2026
- **Observability Features Preview** (Nov 7): Sessions, traces, logs, and events management
- **Free Tier Launch**: New pricing tier for Agent Engine Runtime

### October 2025
- **MiniMax M2**: "end-to-end development workflows" with planning and tool-calling
- **Veo 3.1 Preview** (Oct 15): Advanced video controls and reference-guided generation
- **Computer Use Tool Preview** (Oct 7): "automate tasks in the browser" with agent automation
- **Qwen Models Available**: Image generation and editing variants
- **vLLM TPU**: "highly-efficient serving framework" optimized for Cloud TPU

### September 2025
- **Storage-Optimized Vector Search Preview** (Sep 15): "cost-effective solution for searching massive datasets"
- **Agent Engine SDK Refactor** (Sep 10): "client-based design" migration required
- **Code Execution Preview**: Isolated sandbox environment for agent operations
- **A2A Protocol Support**: Agent-to-Agent protocol development capability
- **DeepSeek-V3.1 Available**: Released through Model Garden

### August 2025
- **Imagen 4 GA** (Aug 14): Generate, Fast Generate, and Ultra Generate models available
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite GA** (July 22): "accessible using the API and Vertex AI Studio"
- **Prompt Optimizer GA**: "generally available" optimization service
- **Open Model Tuning**: Supervised fine-tuning for Llama 3.1 and others
- **Custom Service Accounts**: Agent identity management capability
- **Workforce Identity Federation GA** (Oct 1): "external identity provider" integration for Workbench

### July 2025
- **Veo 3 GA** (July 29): Video generation generally available
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro GA** (June 17): Production-ready versions with expanded capabilities
- **Memory Bank Preview** (July 8): "dynamically generate long-term memories" from conversations
- **Flex-Start VMs Preview** (July 11): "Dynamic Workload Scheduler" discounted pricing option
- **Reservations Support**: Colab Enterprise and Workbench reservation consumption

### June 2025
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite Preview** (June 17): Cost-efficient model variant
- **Live API Private GA** (June 17): Private general availability offering announced
- **Text Embeddings GA** (May 20): gemini-embedding-001 and text-embedding-005 models
- **Lyria 2 GA**: Music generation model generally available
- **Veo 3 Preview** (May 20): Available for allowlisted accounts

### May 2025
- **A3 Ultra and A4 Accelerators**: Support for custom training and online prediction
- **MedLM Deprecated** (May 14): Access discontinued September 29, 2025
- **Global Endpoint GA** (May 2): Generally available global routing option
- **Grounding Features GA** (May 5): "Grounding on your data using Vertex AI Search"
- **Gemini 2.0 Flash Image Generation Preview** (May 7): Image generation capability

### April 2025
- **Agent Development Kit Preview** (April 9): Available in preview state
- **Agent Garden Preview** (April 9): Agent discovery and management interface
- **Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview** (April 9): Public preview offering announced
- **Live API Public Preview** (April 9): "Support for responses in 8 voices and 31 languages"
- **Persistent Resources GA** (April 16): Custom training feature with reboot support
- **Llama 4 Managed APIs Preview** (April 10): Maverick and Scout model variants

## Deprecated/Discontinued Models and Services
- Vertex Explainable AI (March 16, 2026)
- MedLM (May 14, 2025)
- Claude 3 Haiku, 3.5 Haiku, 3.7 Sonnet variants
- Imagen 1 and 2, image captioning, VQA (September 24, 2025)
- Codestral (25.01) and Mistral Large (24.11) (January 23, 2026)
- Multiple video and image generation preview endpoints
- Generative AI module in Vertex AI SDK

## Regional/Availability Updates
- Agent Engine expansion: Europe (Zurich, Milan), Asia (Hong Kong, Seoul, Jakarta), Americas (Toronto, Sao Paulo)
- Runtime charging beginning: Asia-Southeast1, Australia-Southeast2, Europe-West2/3/4 (November 6, 2025)

## Enterprise/Security Features
- Private Service Connect Interface support
- Customer-Managed Encryption Keys (CMEK)
- HIPAA compliance support
- Access Transparency
- VPC Service Controls support
- Confidential Computing integration
- Organization Policy custom constraints

## Last Fetched
2026-03-24
